title: Swiss Cheese
description: Allow crafting of endstone using the awesome Create mod!
body:
This datapack allows you to craft endstone using the Create mod!\
The recipe is as follows:\
![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a898b6372e67ecc23bfae31a39117269a33bfc71.png)

Enjoy!
